description_long: This is a large, cylindrical black barrel with a matte finish and visible surface scratches, suggesting heavy use or exposure to harsh environments. The barrel features two prominent horizontal reinforcement bands encircling its body, likely for structural integrity. A striking detail is the presence of bright green, viscous liquid stains on the lid and sides, giving the impression of hazardous or toxic contents. One side of the barrel displays a yellow warning label with a biohazard symbol and the word 'WARNING BIOHAZARD', indicating dangerous material inside. The lid appears to be sealed, with a green cap or bung at the top center, possibly for filling or emptying the barrel. The overall appearance suggests it is used for storing or transporting hazardous waste in industrial or urban settings.
description: A large black barrel with green toxic stains and a biohazard warning label, reinforced with horizontal bands and a sealed lid.
description_view_0: The barrel is seen with green liquid stains on the lid and upper rim, showing a mostly unmarked black surface.
description_view_1: This view highlights the green cap or bung on the lid, with minimal visible stains and no warning label in sight.
description_view_2: The biohazard warning label is clearly visible, along with some green stains on the lid and side.
description_view_3: Green liquid is seen dripping down the side, with the biohazard label partially visible and more stains on the lower band.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops at top and bottom
attribute_labeling_or_markings: biohazard warning label, green liquid stains
